ddls:
CREATE TABLE "object_detections" (
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object detection */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera that detected the object */,
  "box_1" REAL /* Bounding box coordinate 1 (x1) */,
  "box_2" REAL /* Bounding box coordinate 2 (y1) */,
  "box_3" REAL /* Bounding box coordinate 3 (x2) */,
  "box_4" REAL /* Bounding box coordinate 4 (y2) */,
  "score" REAL /* Confidence score of the detection */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of object detected (e.g., USV for Unmanned Surface Vehicle) */,
  "accept" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the detection is accepted (1) or rejected (0) */,
  "detection_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the detection */,
  "detection_zone" TEXT /* Zone where the object was detected (e.g., entrance, parking lot) */,
  "object_speed" REAL /* Speed of the detected object */,
  "object_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the detected object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_detections_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_detections_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES object_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera */,
  "camera_name" TEXT /* Name of the camera */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the camera is installed */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the camera (e.g., resolution, frame rate) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the camera (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the camera was installed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the camera */,
  "port_number" INTEGER /* Port number of the camera */,
  " firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the camera */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the object type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image associated with the object type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, security personnel, data analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, view detection) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detection that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., security, maintenance) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a notification was sent for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_detection_id FOREIGN KEY ("detection_id") REFERENCES object_detections ("detection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera the configuration belongs to */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the camera (e.g., 1080p, 720p) */,
  "frame_rate" INTEGER /* Frame rate of the camera (frames per second) */,
  "night_vision" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if night vision is enabled */,
  "motion_detection" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if motion detection is enabled */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last configuration update */,
  "sensitivity" INTEGER /* Sensitivity of the motion detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_camera_configurations_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the department manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the system setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the system setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system setting that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the system setting */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the system setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES system_settings ("setting_id")
)
